## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and optimization opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance showing positive momentum: 70 clicks total, significant increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [11 new articles to be published today, 8 more ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Implementing CTAs in articles discussed as a conversion optimization strategy](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Content refresh best practices: update article dates, add relevant CTAs, consider infographics](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [34 articles published, 33 indexed](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [70 clicks total, showing growth and momentum](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Significant increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Manually submitting new articles for indexing to speed up the process](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Content Production Progress

  - [11 new articles to be published today](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [8 more articles ready for review in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Employee texting cluster (10 articles) generated, pending final review](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Employee engagement strategies and metrics cluster planned for February](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)

### Publishing Process Improvements

  - [Andrej and team to be more hands-on with uploading and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Implementing a gatekeeper approach to ensure all elements (meta descriptions, titles) are correct before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Strategies

  - [Discussed adding CTA banners within articles](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Suggested 2-3 CTAs per article, visually distinct from content](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Proposed using image slots as a quick implementation method](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Agreed to create several reusable CTA templates rather than customizing for each article](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

### Content Refresh Best Practices

  - [Update article dates when refreshing content](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Add relevant CTAs to refreshed and new articles](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Consider adding infographics or custom visuals to summarize key points](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Team to review best-performing refreshed content for image/infographic suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Update performance tab with latest article rankings and best keywords](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [Create CTA banner templates and implement in existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Review and suggest infographics for best-performing refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Continue focus on texting and employee engagement metrics clusters for February](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Andrej to monitor and report on SEO performance, adjusting strategy as needed](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Jessica to be absent for next two weeks; Brody to join future calls](https://fathom.video/share/nc2vSZbyxoSMaHT-ms5Dd5NbyBDzeHy_?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
